plugins.name: reaper-composer
plugins.description: One command turns a plain-English request into a finished Reaper project. /reaper-composer:compose orchestrates an arranger, a VST-setup agent, and a composer that write MIDI, FX, and automation through the reaper-mcp server — auto-brainstorming fuzzy ideas and offering a mix at the end. Skills load themselves; remembers your installed VSTs and resumes in-progress songs across sessions.
